---
title: "UPR Health Profile"
# params:
#   country_name: "Default Country"
#   plot_object: NULL
# format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# This chunk loads the necessary packages for the report
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
```

## Health-Related UPR Recommendations

**Report for:** Switzerland

This plot shows all health-related recommendations received by the selected state across all UPR cycles.
```{r}
# This chunk prints the plot object that is passed from the Shiny app
  penguins |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=island, y = body_mass, fill = species))+
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = species),
    position = position_jitterdodge(
      jitter.width = 0.3,  # How much to spread the points horizontally
      dodge.width = 0.9    # Must match the violin's dodge width
    ))+
  geom_violin(quantile.linetype = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), alpha=0.5)
```
